action-centralauth-createlocal: Si khasab ah u samee akoon maxalli ah
centralauth-abortlogin-renamed: Akoonkaaga waxaa loo magac-beddelay "$1". Fadlan isticmaal magacaas beddelkiisa.
centralauth-account-exists: Lama abuuri karo akoon: Magaca isticmaalaha la codsaday waxaa hore u isticmaalaya isticmaale ku jira wiki kale.
centralauth-account-exists-reset: Magaca isticmaalaha $1 kama diiwaangashana wiki-kan, laakiin waxaad dib uga dejin kartaa erayga sirta ah [[Special:CentralAuth/$1|wiki uu ka diiwaangashan yahay]].
centralauth-account-rename-exists: Lama abuuri karo akoon: Magaca isticmaalaha hore ayaa loo isticmaalayaa. Fadlan dooro magac kale.
centralauth-account-unattached-exists: Lama abuuri karo akoon: Magaca isticmaalaha mar hore ayaa la isticmaalayaa. Fadlan dooro magac kale.
centralauth-admin-blocked2-indef: Si aan xad lahayn ayaa loo xannibay.
centralauth-admin-delete-confirm: Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad tirtirto akoonkan?
centralauth-admin-info-editcount: Tirada guud ee wax ka beddelka:
centralauth-admin-info-expired: Koontada ku meelgaarka ah waa dhacday:
centralauth-admin-intro: Is dhexgalka waxaa loo isticmaali karaa maareynta akoonnada caalamiga ah.
centralauth-admin-logsnippet: Isbeddelladii hore ee akoonka caalamiga ah
centralauth-admin-no-unified: Ma jiro akoon mideysan oo leh magacan isticmaale.
centralauth-admin-none-selected: Ma jiraan akoonno la xushay oo wax laga beddelo.
centralauth-admin-setstatus-success: Waxaad beddeshay xaaladda akoonka caalamiga ah "$1".
centralauth-admin-suppressreason: Waxaa si caalami ah u qariyay $1 sababo la xiriira: $2
centralauth-admin-unhide-nonexistent: Khalad: akoonka caalamiga ah "<nowiki>$1</nowiki>" ma jiro.
centralauth-automatic-global-groups-reas: Kooxaha caalamiga ah si otomaatig ah ayaa loo cusboonaysiiyay sababtoo ah isbeddelka kooxda maxalliga ah.
centralauth-contribs-locked:
Koontadan waa mid caalami ahaan la qufulay.
Eeg [[Special:CentralAuth/$1|faahfaahinta koontada caalamiga ah]] si aad u hesho macluumaad dheeraad ah.
centralauth-contribs-locked-log:
Akoonkan si caalami ah ayaa loo qufulay.
Diiwaankii ugu dambeeyay ee qufulka ayaa hoos lagu bixiyey si tixraac loogu qaato:
centralauth-createlocal-already-exists: Waxaa hore u jiray akoon maxalli ah oo u dhigma akoonka caalamiga ah ee la cayimay.
centralauth-createlocal-no-global-accoun: Ma jiro akoon caalami ah oo sidan oo kale ah.
centralauth-createlocal-pretext: Waxaad isticmaali kartaa foomkan si aad ugu samayso akoon maxalli ah akoon caalami ah haddii uusan isagu samaysan karin sababo jira awgood.
centralauth-createlocal-success: Akoon maxalli ah ayaa la sameeyay.
centralauth-createlocal-suppressed: Ma abuuri kartid akoon maxalli ah isticmaalaha la qariyay.
centralauth-error-badtoken-title: Calaamadda URL-ka soo celinta waa khalad
centralauth-finish-text: Haddii akoonnadan ay adiga ku leeyihiin, waxaad dhammaystiri kartaa habka mideynta gelitaanka adigoo si fudud halkan ugu qoraya furayaasha sirta ah ee akoonnada kale:
centralauth-finishglobaliseemail_body:
Ciwaankaaga iimaylka waxaa lala xiriiriyay akoonka "$2" dhammaan mashaariicda, iyadoo akoonkaaga ugu weyn uu ku yaal {{SITENAME}}.

Si loo xaqiijiyo in akoonkani dhab ahaan adiga kuu leeyahay, loona mideeyo akoonnada aan si toos ah loo midayn, iyo si aad u soo ceshato akoonkaaga haddii aad lumiso erayga sirta ah, fadlan fur xiriiriyahaan biraawsarkaaga:

$3

Haddii akoonku uusan adiga kuu ahayn, raac xiriiriyaha si aad u joojiso xaqiijinta ciwaanka iimaylka:

$5

Koodhkan xaqiijinta wuxuu dhacayaa $6 at $7.
centralauth-foreign-contributions: $1 {{PLURAL:$1|wax ku biirin|wax ku biirino}} oo ku saabsan $2
centralauth-listusers-nolocal: ku lifaaqan ma aha ama maxalli ahaan ma jiro
centralauth-login-error-locked: {{GENDER:$1|Adiga}} ma geli kartid sababtoo ah {{GENDER:$1|koontadaada}} waa la xannibay si caalami ah.
centralauth-merge-method-new-desc: Waxa ay muujinaysaa  in la sameeyey akoon caalami ah si iskeed ah markii la sameeyey akoonkaan maxalliga ah.
centralauth-rename-confirm: Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad guud ahaan u beddesho magaca isticmaalahan?
centralauth-rename-form-overrideantispoo: Ka gudub khilaaf kasta oo AntiSpoof ah
centralauth-rename-form-suppressredirect: Ka hortag abuurista dib u jeediyeyaasha
centralauth-rename-listed-on-denylist: Isticmaalahan wuxuu ku jiraa liiska caalamiga ah ee diidmada magac beddelka. Si magac beddel loogu sameeyo isticmaalahan, liiska diidmada waa in marka hore la beddelaa.
centralauth-rename-movelog: Bogga si otomaatig ah ayaa loo wareejiyay intii lagu jiray magaca beddelka isticmaalaha "[[Special:CentralAuth/$1|$1]]" loona beddelay "[[Special:CentralAuth/$2|$2]]"
centralauth-rename-notinprogress: Ma jiraan wax magaca beddello ah oo socda oo loogu talagalay $1. Waxaa laga yaabaa inay hore u dhammaadeen.
centralauth-rename-queued:
Hawlaha magaca looga beddelayo $1 loona beddelayo $2 ayaa safka la geliyay.

Ka eeg horumarka [[Special:GlobalRenameProgress/$2]].
centralauth-rename-same-name: Isticmaaluhu mar hore ayuu leeyahay magaca isticmaalaha la codsaday.
createlocalaccount: Si khasab ah u samee akoon maxalli ah
globalrenameprogress-legend: Eeg horumarka magac beddelka caalamiga ah
globalrenamequeue: Safka codsiyada magac beddelka caalamiga ah
globalrenamequeue-email-subject-approved: Codsiga magac beddelka akoonka waa la oggolaaday
globalrenamequeue-email-subject-rejected: Codsiga magac beddelka akoonka waa la diiday
globalrenamequeue-vanish-email-body-appr:
Codsiga baa ba'a akoonka "{{GENDER:$1|$1}}" waa la oggolaaday.

Ogow: $2
Codsiga baa ba'a akoonka "{{GENDER:$1|$1}}" waa la oggolaaday.
globalrenamequeue-vanish-email-body-reje:
Codsiga baa ba' akoonka "{{GENDER:$1|$1}}" waa la diiday.

Ogow: $2
globalrenamequeue-vanish-email-subject-a: Codsiga baaba'a ee koontada waa la oggolaaday
globalrenamequeue-vanish-email-subject-r: Codsiga baaba'a ee koontada waa la diiday
globalrenamequeue-request-vanish-header: [$1 $2] ayaa codsanaya in baa ba'o akoonkiisa una guuro $3.
globalrenamequeue-request-vanish-userinf:
* magaca isticmaalaha hadda: [[Special:CentralAuth/$1|$1]]
* wiki-ga guriga: $2
* tirada caalamiga ee wax ka beddelka: $3
* ma xanniban yahay: $4

globalrenamerequest: Codsiga magac beddelka akoonka isticmaalaha caalamiga ah
globalvanishrequest-pretext:
Baaba'du waa '''miciinka ugu dambeeya''' waana in '''la isticmaalaa oo kaliya marka aad rabto inaad joojiso wax ka beddelka weligaa''' iyo sidoo kale si aad u qariso inta ugu badan ee xiriirradiisii hore. Tirtiridda koontada waxaa lagu sameeyaa iyadoo la beddelayo magaca koontadaada si dadka kale aysan u aqoonsan wax ku darsashadaada nidaamka loo yaqaanno baaba'da koontada. '''Baaba'du ma dammaanad qaadayso qarsoodi buuxda ama ma tirtirto wax ku darsashadii mashaariicda'''.

Si aad u sii waddo bilaabista nidaamka baaba'aya, fadlan buuxi foomka codsiga ee Baaba'da Koontada ee hoos ku qoran.
globalvanishrequest-blocked-title: Codsiga baaba’a ee koontada guud waa la diiday sababtoo ah koontadaada waa la xannibay
globalvanishrequest-autoapprove-public-n: Codsigan baaba'a ee isticmaalaha si otomaatig ah ayaa loo oggolaaday.
grant-createlocalaccount: Si qasab ah u samee akoon maxalli ah oo loogu talagalay akoon caalami ah
log-action-filter-newusers-forcecreatelo: Abuurista akoon maxalli ah oo khasab ah
logentry-gblrename-merge: $1 ayaa si caalami ah {{GENDER:$2|ugu daray}} $4 gudaha $5
logentry-gblrename-promote: $1 ayaa si caalami ah {{GENDER:$2|magaca uga beddelay}} $4 una beddelay $5
logentry-gblrename-rename: $1 ayaa si caalami ah {{GENDER:$2|magaca uga beddelay}} $4 una beddelay $5
logentry-newusers-forcecreatelocal: $1 si khasab ah ayuu u {{GENDER:$2|sameeyay}} akoon maxalli ah oo loogu talagalay $3
